subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Bountiful. His is the bounty and grace, and His is the mercy and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الکریم له الجود و الفضل و له الرحمه و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
